data.name: Monster Hookups
data.detailed_description:
Combine ritual items with the power of witchy alchemy and summon hot monsters to hook up with. Top and be topped by vampires, werewolves, and faeries. Discover all the creatures in your Sexonomicon and solve the puzzle of how to have the most satisfying night.

Key features

  • Combine items to summon monsters and unlock new items

  • Discover 7 items and 16 monsters

  • Customize your witch's skin tone and hair color

  • Unlock sandbox mode and enjoy any monster anytime

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 or newer
  • 處理器: Intel Core 2 Duo E8200, AMD FX-4100
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Intel HD Graphics 2500, AMD Radeon R5 Graphics
  • 儲存空間: 150 MB 可用空間
